title: Two-agent coordination via event-bus-web
description:
Agent 1 (the sim agent) receives a coordination request from Agent 2 via agent.message topics (the event-bus-web path), processes it, and publishes a response. Tests that agents can use the Phase 3 agent-to-agent messaging protocol.

Note: The deterministic CI test uses the same UID for sender and receiver because the test process has a single kernel UID. In VM deployment, the isolation service assigns distinct agent UIDs, and the agent.message protocol validates distinct sender→receiver coordination. The scenario is designed for distinct UIDs; the deterministic smoke test validates the protocol path with available identity.
